final_response:
Sure, I can connect you with a human support specialist right away. To do that I’ll need a few quick details:

1. **Your email address** (the one linked to your AuraSync account)  
2. **Order number** (if you have one)  
3. **Brief description of the issue** (1‑2 sentences)  
4. **Steps you’ve already tried** (e.g., reset, app reinstall, etc.)  
5. **Urgency level** – Critical (safety/fraud), High (legal/financial), or Normal  

Once I have that information I’ll immediately route you to a human agent. Please provide the details above, and I’ll take care of the escalation for you.

arguments.message: please connect ahuman resource as soon as possible

data.customer_message: please connect ahuman resource as soon as possible

arguments.query: please connect ahuman resource as soon as possible

hits.title: Is my AuraSync compatible with Android and iPhone?
hits.summary: Yes. All AuraSync earbuds are compatible with any Bluetooth-enabled device. The AuraConnect companion app (for enhanced EQ and ANC controls) is available on both iOS (14+) and Android (10+).

hits.title: What information must I collect before escalating?
hits.summary: Before calling escalate_to_human, collect as much of the following as possible. Customer email address (to locate their account). Order number (if applicable). Brief description of the issue (1-2 sentences). Steps already attempted. Urgency level: Critical (safety/fraud), High (legal/financial), Normal.

hits.title: How do I reset my password?
hits.summary: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. A reset link will be sent to the registered email address. The link expires after 15 minutes. If the customer does not receive the email, advise them to check their spam folder and confirm the email address used at registration.
